/plan "fix the plugin error with pagination and scrapting. Scenario: we have set a max of 3 pages or results. We click the scrape results button and the real estate url opens and the script is injected. The very first page scrapes properly. Then the pagination jumps to page 2, then to page 3, then to page 4 where the results are sraped properly. Then pagination jumps to page 5, then 6, then 7 where the page is scraped properly. Could be a timinig and or a logic issue."

in the plugin, when we are extracting, we can check the title element to see if it starts with 'For rent' or 'For sale' to determine if it is a rent or sale listing. Here is an example : <title>
    For rent: 1406 HEMLOCK ROAD, Ottawa, Ontario K1K5A8 - X12685220 | REALTOR.ca
</title>
The pagination is getting better, but we are not waiting long enough when we click the pagination button for the new property listing cards to load, wait for a 5 second timeout
ok, set the MAX_WAIT_FOR_NEW_CARDS to 10 seconds
since we are replacing cards, is our mutation event working properly?
The 3 and 2 clicks are actual the code paginating 2 times and 3 times before detecting that there are new cards.
